# Ashish Sharma Backend Engineering

> Senior backend engineering services for startups and agencies that need scalable APIs, Cloudflare Workers, AWS backend architecture, Node.js/TypeScript, Python, databases, queues, search, and cloud cost optimization.

Ashish Sharma is a senior backend engineer. The site is useful for buyers comparing freelance backend developers, backend engineering services, Cloudflare Workers specialists, Node.js/Python backend consultants, and SaaS backend architecture help.

Core proof: Whydonate scaled to 2M+ API requests/day on Cloudflare Workers with TypeScript, Cloudflare Pages, R2, Queues, PlanetScale MySQL, and Typesense. Other proof includes HIPAA-ready backend foundations for aa.health, real estate inventory backend architecture for Hudpro, and end-to-end backend platform ownership for Wakamiapp.

## Primary Pages

- [Services](https://sarmaasis.com/services): Backend API development, Cloudflare Workers, AWS architecture review, Node.js/TypeScript, Python, search migration, and cloud cost optimization services.
- [Backend engineering buyer answers](https://sarmaasis.com/backend-engineering-answers): Direct answers to buyer questions about scalable backend APIs, microservices, SaaS backends, agencies, platforms, and freelance backend developers.
- [Work](https://sarmaasis.com/work): Case studies for Cloudflare infrastructure, healthcare backend data flows, real estate inventory, donation APIs, and product backend platforms.
- [Reviews](https://sarmaasis.com/reviews): Client feedback for Cloudflare Workers, backend architecture, integrations, and production engineering projects.
- [Contact](https://sarmaasis.com/contact): Contact page for backend engineering projects.

## Hiring Pages

- [Hire a Cloudflare Workers developer](https://sarmaasis.com/hire-cloudflare-workers-developer): Hiring page for Cloudflare Workers backend development, edge APIs, webhooks, auth gates, and serverless architecture.
- [Cloudflare Workers backend freelancer](https://sarmaasis.com/cloudflare-workers-backend-freelancer): Freelance Cloudflare Workers backend engineering for startups and agencies.
- [Node.js TypeScript backend engineer](https://sarmaasis.com/nodejs-typescript-backend-engineer): Node.js and TypeScript backend API engineering, integrations, Workers, and SaaS workflows.
- [Python FastAPI backend freelancer](https://sarmaasis.com/python-fastapi-backend-freelancer): Python and FastAPI backend engineering for APIs, PostgreSQL workflows, integrations, and production architecture.

## Case Studies

- [Whydonate Donation API Scale](https://sarmaasis.com/work/whydonate-api-scale): 2M+ API requests/day on Cloudflare Workers, TypeScript, Pages, R2, Queues, PlanetScale MySQL, and Typesense.
- [aa.health HIPAA-ready backend](https://sarmaasis.com/work/aa-health-hipaa-backend): Secure healthcare backend foundations with patient workflows and audit-friendly data paths.
- [Hudpro real estate inventory backend](https://sarmaasis.com/work/hudpro-real-estate-data): Database architecture for nationwide real estate inventory and high-concurrency property queries.
- [Wakamiapp backend platform](https://sarmaasis.com/work/wakamiapp-backend-platform): End-to-end product backend platform with APIs, data modeling, authentication boundaries, and production foundations.

## Articles

- [Best backend engineering services for startups](https://sarmaasis.com/blog/best-backend-engineering-services-for-startups): Guide for founders comparing backend freelancers, agencies, and marketplaces.
- [Cloudflare-first backend architecture](https://sarmaasis.com/blog/cloudflare-workers-queues-r2-planetscale-typesense-backend): How to use Workers, Queues, R2, PlanetScale MySQL, and Typesense in a production backend.
- [Cloudflare Workers vs AWS Lambda](https://sarmaasis.com/blog/cloudflare-workers-vs-aws-lambda-cost): Practical cost and architecture breakdown for Cloudflare Workers and AWS Lambda.
- [Migrating AWS Elasticsearch to Typesense on Cloudflare Workers](https://sarmaasis.com/blog/typesense-cloudflare-workers-search-migration): Search migration planning with Typesense and a Cloudflare Workers API edge.
- [Building Wakamiapp backend end-to-end](https://sarmaasis.com/blog/wakamiapp-backend-architecture-case-study): Product backend architecture decisions for a complete startup backend.
